title: frontend: SimpleTable: Fix synchronous setPage(0) during render
author: ayushmaan-16

findings.description: Description says 'useEffect hook' but final implementation uses render-phase setPage(0); description should be updated.
eslint-disable suppression on useEffect dep array may no longer be needed now that normalizedData replaces data; verify and remove if possible.
normalizedData = data ?? null cleanly normalises undefined input so all downstream null-checks are consistent.
filteredData in React.useMemo above the early return ensures pagination checks work regardless of displayData null state.
Render-phase setPage(0) stabilises in two renders (second render has page=0, condition is false); no infinite loop risk.
getSortData refactored to a pure function returning sorted array makes it composable and avoids hidden setState side effects.
